category_sources: source_facts.description says osm2pgrouting imports OSM data into a pgRouting database; official pgRouting/osm2pgrouting README describes importing OpenStreetMap data and preparing PostgreSQL/PostGIS/pgRouting.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and current_curation.display-name both provide osm2pgrouting; official GitHub repository is pgRouting/osm2pgrouting.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official pgRouting osm2pgrouting docs page; official GitHub README has requirements, documentation, installation, and usage sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/pgRouting/osm2pgrouting; per instruction repo was not redetermined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies OSM-to-pgRouting import; official README lists PostgreSQL, PostGIS, and pgRouting requirements for importing OpenStreetMap data.
